title: Maa Chandraghanta Mantra
intro: Read the Maa Chandraghanta Mantra with meaning. Chant this mantra with devotion to receive the grace of Mother Chandraghanta.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Devi Chandraghantayai Namah.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to
Goddess Chandraghanta.

faq.q1: When should Maa Chandraghanta Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Maa Chandraghanta Mantra is considered auspicious when chanted in the morning or on the third day of Navratri.
faq.q2: How many times should Maa Chandraghanta Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Maa Chandraghanta Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting this mantra is believed to bring courage, protection, peace of mind, and the blessings of Maa Chandraghanta.
faq.q4: Can Maa Chandraghanta Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a4: Yes, Maa Chandraghanta Mantra can be chanted daily with devotion.
faq.q5: Can anyone chant Maa Chandraghanta Mantra?
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant Maa Chandraghanta Mantra with faith and devotion.
